description: Create DiffEngine Svelte component for managing comparison state
context:
Beads description:
Create a Svelte 5 component that manages the diff comparison lifecycle and persists scores.

## File: src/lib/battle_mode/DiffEngine.svelte

## Purpose
Encapsulates the comparison logic, polling, state management, AND score persistence for real-time diffing.

## Props (using $props())
```ts
interface Props {
  contestantElement: HTMLElement | null;  // User's rendered output
  targetImageSrc: string;                  // Target image URL
  haxId: string;                           // For persisting score
  enabled?: boolean;                       // Enable/disable comparison
  interval?: number;                       // Comparison interval (default 400ms)
}
```

## State (using $state)
- score: number | null - Current similarity score (0-100)
- diffCanvas: HTMLCanvasElement | null - Visual diff output
- isComparing: boolean - Lock to prevent overlapping comparisons
- error: string | null - Any error message
- lastSavedScore: number | null - For throttling DB updates

## Behavior
1. When enabled and elements are available, start polling
2. Every interval ms:
   a. Capture contestant element using snapdom
   b. Load target image into canvas
   c. Run compareImages
   d. Update local score and diffCanvas state
   e. If score changed by >= 1%, persist to DB via mutation
3. Clean up interval on unmount ($effect cleanup)
4. Expose state to parent via bindable or snippet

## Score Persistence
```ts
import { z } from '$lib/zero.svelte';

// Throttled persistence - only save when score changes significantly
$effect(() => {
  if (score !== null && Math.abs(score - (lastSavedScore ?? 0)) >= 1) {
    z.mutate.updateDiffScore({ haxId, score: Math.round(score) });
    lastSavedScore = score;
  }
});
```

## Events/Callbacks
Consider exposing via props:
- onScore?: (score: number) => void
- onDiff?: (canvas: HTMLCanvasElement) => void

## Implementation Notes
- Use $effect for lifecycle management
- Debounce if contestant content changes rapidly
- Handle errors gracefully (CORS, element not ready)
- Consider using requestAnimationFrame for smoother updates
- Page Visibility API to pause when tab hidden

## Acceptance Criteria
- Component compiles with no TS errors
- Properly starts/stops polling based on enabled prop
- Exposes score and diffCanvas for parent consumption
- Persists score to database via Zero mutation
- Throttles DB writes appropriately
- Handles edge cases (null elements, failed captures)
